name: Drag Reorder
description: Drag-to-reorder list with spring-based layout transitions and elevation shadow on the dragged item.
accessibility_notes: needs keyboard reorder support for accessibility
dragged item z-index change may confuse screen readers

items.description: Array of items to render and reorder

onReorder.description: Callback with the new reordered array

itemHeight.description: Fixed height of each list item in pixels

className.description: CSS class for the list container

conflicts: fixed itemHeight — all items must be the same height
